work_unit: SZ-BG-M-001: guard sendResponse against disconnected sender
situation: audit-2026-07-07-047 derived fix. MV3 service worker onMessage listener calls sendResponse after async handleMessage resolves. If popup/sidepanel closes during await, Chrome throws 'message port closed' which goes unhandled — silent failure with no error recovery.
action: Add safeSendResponse wrapper that catches sendResponse errors and swallows via chrome.runtime.lastError. Applied to both .then() and .catch() paths in onMessage listener.
outcome_evidence: commit 56bc916 on auto/opt-background-1783213292 pushed to origin. vitest 52/53 pass (1 pre-existing fail from SZ-BG-H-003 tile ownership, confirmed identical before/after this change). cp-guard diverged wt → case-104 direct-edit escape hatch used.
next_suggestion: Continue dispatching audit-2026-07-07-047 pending route-fixes. Next priority: SZ-BG-M-002 (detectFailed flag not set in parallel path)
Consider merging opt-background-1783213292 (now has H-001/H-002/H-003 + M-001 stacked) to unblock further background fixes

audit_findings.finding: sendResponse called after async may silently fail if sender disconnects (popup close, tab navigation)
audit_findings.remediation: Wrap sendResponse in try/catch guard; swallow 'message port closed' via chrome.runtime.lastError
